author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو زكريا يحيى بن معين بن عون بن زياد بن بسطام بن عبد الرحمن المري بالولاء، البغدادي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: One of the most prominent hadith scholars and critics of the early Islamic period, known for his expertise in the evaluation of narrators.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A foundational work in the field of hadith criticism, providing critical evaluations of hadith narrators.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: This work is significant for its detailed evaluations of hadith narrators, which have been widely referenced in later works on hadith criticism.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Ahmad Muhammad Nur Sayf is a respected scholar known for his contributions to the field of hadith studies and textual criticism.
